projects.name: NornicDB
projects.description: NornicDB is a high-performance graph + vector database built for AI agents and knowledge systems. It speaks Neo4j's (Bolt + Cypher) and qdrant's (gRPC) languages so you can use Nornic with zero code changes, while adding intelligent features like local LLM inference, embeddings, rerank, HNSW search, GPU acceleration, auto-TLP, and tiered memory.
